positive: A sophisticated and whimsical forest scene at twilight, featuring a stylized silhouette of a majestic fox sitting on a branch of gnarled oak trees. The background should incorporate abstract, glowing celestial elements like constellations and crescent moons, rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and muted gold. The fox and the trees should be sharp, clean, and highly contrasted against the gradient background. Art style: Neo-Mandalic watercolor illustration meets minimalist linework, suitable for high-end apparel print. Composition: Central, balanced, and symmetrical. Lighting: Dramatic, low-key contrast lighting emphasizing glowing edges and deep shadows. Color direction: Deep jewel tones with pops of iridescent glow. Highly detailed, vector-graphic aesthetic, 4k print resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, writing, messy, poor composition
